build_verification.note: One mypy narrowing warning (str < None at _brain_query.py:184) was PR-introduced and FIXED INLINE before bundle write; head is now clean.

size.note: Over the 200-line carve-out line threshold but the bulk is a new test file; production change is ~84 lines in one module.

architecture.note: Reuses existing iter_entities read seam; no new infra import, no external call, no secret, no domain reach-through.

security.note: Pure read over local files; lexicographic string compare; iter_entities already skips malformed files. No auth/injection/SSRF/secrets surface.

quality.note: One mypy narrowing finding fixed inline. Tests included (real-adapter MEA-09). No dead surface, no contract drift. CR-10: O(N) walk over one entity type, identical to existing find_entities; no N+1 introduced.
